---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# SLpop

<!-- Add your hex sticker here later -->
<img src="man/figures/SLpop_hexSticker.png" align="right" width="180"/> 

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

## Overview

**SLpop** is an R data package that provides datasets from the Sri Lanka Census of Population and Housing 2024 (CPH 2024). The package facilitates easy access to census data for statistical analysis, visualization, and research in R.


## Installation

Install the development version from GitHub using **pak**:

```r
install.packages("pak")
pak::pkg_install("amalirajapaksha/SLpop")
```

Alternatively, using **remotes**:

```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("amalirajapaksha/SLpop")
```

## Example

Load the package.

```{r}
library(SLpop)
```

View all available datasets.

```{r}
list_datasets()
```

Load a dataset.

```{r echo=TRUE, results='hide'}
data("gn_pop_age_sex")

head(gn_pop_age_sex)
```

Display the structure of the dataset.

```{r}
str(gn_pop_age_sex)
```

Obtain summary statistics.

```{r, echo=TRUE, results='hide'}
summary(gn_pop_age_sex)
```

View the dataset documentation.

```{r eval=FALSE}
?gn_pop_age_sex
```

## Data Source

The datasets are compiled from the **Sri Lanka Census of Population and Housing 2024**, published by the Department of Census and Statistics, Sri Lanka.
